GM:(0,0,0)  R:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  S:(1/2,1/2,0)  T:(0,1/2,1/2)  U:(1/2,0,1/2)  X:(1/2,0,0)  Y:(0,1/2,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
GM:(0,0,0)  E:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  A:(1/2,0,1/2)  D:(0,1/2,1/2)  C:(1/2,1/2,0)  Y:(1/2,0,0)  B:(0,0,1/2)  Z:(0,1/2,0)
GM1+  GM1-  GM2+  GM2-  GM4  GM6  GM3  GM5  (R)E1+E1+  (R)E1-E1-  (R)E2+E2+  (R)E2-E2-  (R)E4E4  (R)E6E6  (R)E3E3  (R)E5E5  (S)A1+A1+  (S)A1-A1-  (S)A2+A2+  (S)A2-A2-  (S)A4A4  (S)A6A6  (S)A3A3  (S)A5A5  (T)D1+D2-  (T)D1-D2+  (T)D4D5  (T)D3D6  (U)C1+C2-  (U)C1-C2+  (U)C4C5  (U)C3C6  (X)Y1+Y2-  (X)Y1-Y2+  (X)Y4Y5  (X)Y3Y6  (Y)B1+B2-  (Y)B1-B2+  (Y)B4B5  (Y)B3B6  Z1+  Z1-  Z2+  Z2-  Z4  Z6  Z3  Z5
